props.name: hideLabel
props.description: Visually hide the label (kept for assistive tech) — for compact toolbars.

props.name: items
props.description: Options (`{ value, label?, disabled? }`); `label` falls back to `value`.

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Trigger text when nothing is selected.

props.name: width
props.description: Width behaviour: `wrap` fits the longest option (plus the trigger padding), `fill` takes 100% of the container, `fixed` uses `--ds-select-width` (16rem by default).

props.name: name
props.description: Form field name — the selected value is submitted under it (via a hidden input).

props.name: onValueChange
props.description: Called whenever the selected value changes.
